topic: why senior devs hate unnecessary meetings
hook: The why senior devs hate unnecessary meetings dilemma.

script_segments.text: The why senior devs hate unnecessary meetings dilemma.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing why senior devs hate unnecessary meetings. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: If you're still on the left... we need to talk. Comment your pick.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: I wish someone told me this about why senior devs hate unnecessary meetings sooner.
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
